69cf0b9dd7d2715797a83dac description:
You swore you left for good this time,
Yet here you are, my friend.
The streets call like a midnight chime,
Your battle never ends.
69cf0bfad7d2715797a83daf: Kill PMCs on Streets of Tarkov
69cf0c7c185a5729e3c907bf description:
Four fools who walked my streets now fall,
From bits and ash to dust,
The loot, the gear, you'll take it all,
Stay quiet, my friend, now mush!
69cf0c7c185a5729e3c907bf successMessageT: A true ally of the people.
69d1ebe31e775b89a6e4b034 description:
Trapped by doors, broken,
The locksmith's phone rings, and rings,
And nothing opens.

69d2b175f16f7b56dfcc29f6 description:
No science will ever give them bread so long as they remain free, so long as they refuse to lay that freedom at our feet, and say: "Enslave, but feed us!"
That day must come when men will understand that freedom and daily bread enough to satisfy all are unthinkable and can never be had together, as men will never be able to fairly divide the two among themselves.
And they will also learn that they can never be free, for they are weak, vicious, miserable nonentities born wicked and rebellious.
69d2b175f16f7b56dfcc29f6 successMessageT: Tarkov, we will burn to the ground... perhaps this suffering will finally stir something.
69d2b42386866406273700cb description: The old man longs to hear His voice, to hear Him reply; better words of bitterness and scorn than His silence. Suddenly He rises; slowly and silently approaching the Inquisitor, He bends towards him and softly kisses the bloodless, four-score and-ten-year-old lips. That is all the answer.
